notes: Lux-maintained mirror of uloop CLI surface for self-conversion sync

commands.name: list
commands.description: List detected Unity projects and their current loopable state.

args.name: project_path
args.help: Optional project path to scope the listing to a single Unity project.

commands.name: sync
commands.description: Synchronize uloop metadata and local project state.

args.name: project_path
args.help: Optional project path to sync a specific Unity project.

commands.name: completion
commands.description: Generate or install shell completion scripts for uloop.

args.name: install
args.help: Install the completion script into the current shell profile instead of printing it.

args.name: shell
args.help: Target shell for the completion script output or installation.

commands.name: update
commands.description: Update uloop and refresh its local installation metadata.

commands.name: fix
commands.description: Apply repair actions to a Unity project that is out of sync or partially broken.

args.name: project_path
args.help: Optional Unity project path to repair in place.

commands.name: skills
commands.description: Manage uloop skill packages for supported AI clients and global installs.

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: List installed or available skill targets for a client scope.

args.name: target
args.help: Skill target to inspect.

subcommands.name: install
subcommands.description: Install uloop skills for a chosen client or global target.

args.name: target
args.help: Destination target for skill installation.

subcommands.name: uninstall
subcommands.description: Remove installed uloop skills from a chosen client or global target.

args.name: target
args.help: Destination target from which skills will be removed.

commands.name: launch
commands.description: Launch or attach uloop to a Unity project and prepare the editor session.

args.name: project-path
args.help: Positional project path to launch; omitted values use the current working directory.

args.name: restart
args.help: Restart the Unity process before launching the project loop.

args.name: delete-recovery
args.help: Delete recovery state before starting the new launch session.

args.name: quit
args.help: Quit the current Unity instance before launching a new one.

args.name: platform
args.help: Override the target platform used for launch preparation.

args.name: max-depth
args.help: Maximum directory depth to scan when resolving Unity project roots.

args.name: add-unity-hub
args.help: Register the project with Unity Hub when launching.

args.name: favorite
args.help: Mark the project as a favorite in the launcher metadata.

commands.name: focus-window
commands.description: Bring the Unity project window to the foreground.

args.name: project_path
args.help: Optional project path whose editor window should be focused.

commands.name: compile
commands.description: Trigger a Unity script recompilation for the selected project.

args.name: force-recompile
args.help: Force a recompile even when the project appears up to date.

args.name: wait-for-domain-reload
args.help: Wait until Unity finishes the domain reload before returning.

args.name: project_path
args.help: Unity project path to compile.

commands.name: get-logs
commands.description: Read Unity console logs with filtering and optional stack trace search.

args.name: log-type
args.help: Console severity to return from Unity logs.

args.name: max-count
args.help: Maximum number of log entries to return.

args.name: search-text
args.help: Text to match against the log message body.

args.name: include-stack-trace
args.help: Include stack traces in the returned log records.

args.name: use-regex
args.help: Interpret search text as a regular expression.

args.name: search-in-stack-trace
args.help: Search the stack trace text in addition to the log message.

args.name: project_path
args.help: Unity project path whose logs should be queried.

commands.name: run-tests
commands.description: Execute Unity tests in edit mode or play mode with optional filtering.

args.name: test-mode
args.help: Test runner mode to execute.

args.name: filter-type
args.help: How the filter value should be interpreted.

args.name: filter-value
args.help: Filter string, regex, or assembly name depending on filter type.

args.name: save-before-run
args.help: Save modified assets before starting the test run.

args.name: project_path
args.help: Unity project path to test.

commands.name: clear-console
commands.description: Clear the Unity console output for the selected project.

args.name: add-confirmation-message
args.help: Emit a confirmation message after the console is cleared.

args.name: project_path
args.help: Unity project path whose console should be cleared.

commands.name: focus-window
commands.description: Bring the active Unity editor window for a project into focus.

args.name: project_path
args.help: Unity project path whose editor window should be focused.

commands.name: get-hierarchy
commands.description: Inspect the active Unity scene hierarchy and optionally include component details.

args.name: root-path
args.help: Optional hierarchy root path to start traversal from.

args.name: max-depth
args.help: Maximum traversal depth; use -1 for unlimited depth.

args.name: include-components
args.help: Include component names for each hierarchy node.

args.name: include-inactive
args.help: Include inactive GameObjects in the hierarchy dump.

args.name: include-paths
args.help: Include full hierarchy paths for returned nodes.

args.name: use-components-lut
args.help: Control whether the component lookup table is used during hierarchy inspection.

args.name: use-selection
args.help: Start hierarchy inspection from the current selection.

args.name: project_path
args.help: Unity project path whose hierarchy should be queried.

commands.name: find-game-objects
commands.description: Search for GameObjects by name, path, components, tag, or layer.

args.name: name-pattern
args.help: Name pattern to search for within the scene.

args.name: search-mode
args.help: Matching strategy used for the object search.

args.name: required-components
args.help: Component names that each result must contain.

args.name: tag
args.help: Tag that matching GameObjects must have.

args.name: layer
args.help: Layer index that matching GameObjects must belong to.

args.name: max-results
args.help: Maximum number of matches to return.

args.name: include-inactive
args.help: Include inactive GameObjects in the search results.

args.name: include-inherited-properties
args.help: Include inherited component properties in result metadata.

args.name: project_path
args.help: Unity project path to search.

commands.name: screenshot
commands.description: Capture a Unity window or rendering output as a screenshot.

args.name: window-name
args.help: Window name to capture.

args.name: resolution-scale
args.help: Scale multiplier applied to the capture resolution.

args.name: match-mode
args.help: How the window name should be matched.

args.name: output-directory
args.help: Directory where the screenshot file should be written.

args.name: capture-mode
args.help: Choose between window capture and render-target capture.

args.name: annotate-elements
args.help: Overlay detected UI elements on the screenshot.

args.name: elements-only
args.help: Capture only detected elements instead of the full window.

args.name: project_path
args.help: Unity project path whose editor window should be captured.

commands.name: execute-dynamic-code
commands.description: Compile and execute dynamic code inside the Unity editor process.

args.name: code
args.help: Source code to compile and execute inside Unity.

args.name: parameters
args.help: Structured parameters available to the dynamic code runtime.

args.name: compile-only
args.help: Compile the code without executing it.

args.name: yield-to-foreground-requests
args.help: Allow foreground requests to interrupt the dynamic execution loop.

args.name: project_path
args.help: Unity project path whose editor should run the dynamic code.

commands.name: get-project-info
commands.description: Return high-level information about the active Unity project.

commands.name: get-version
commands.description: Return the installed uloop version and build metadata.

commands.name: control-play-mode
commands.description: Control Unity play mode state from the loop runtime.

args.name: action
args.help: Play mode command to send to Unity.

args.name: project_path
args.help: Unity project path whose play mode should be controlled.

commands.name: simulate-mouse-ui
commands.description: Simulate mouse interaction against Unity UI elements or screen coordinates.

args.name: action
args.help: UI mouse action to simulate.

args.name: x
args.help: Target x coordinate for the mouse action.

args.name: y
args.help: Target y coordinate for the mouse action.

args.name: from-x
args.help: Starting x coordinate for drag actions.

args.name: from-y
args.help: Starting y coordinate for drag actions.

args.name: drag-speed
args.help: Drag speed used when simulating drag gestures.

args.name: duration
args.help: Duration of the simulated pointer action in seconds.

args.name: button
args.help: Mouse button to use for the interaction.

args.name: bypass-raycast
args.help: Bypass raycast targeting when interacting with UI.

args.name: target-path
args.help: Optional hierarchy path of the target UI element.

args.name: drop-target-path
args.help: Optional hierarchy path of the drop target for drag operations.

args.name: project_path
args.help: Unity project path whose UI should receive the simulated mouse action.

commands.name: simulate-mouse-input
commands.description: Simulate low-level mouse input at screen coordinates.

args.name: action
args.help: Mouse input primitive to simulate.

args.name: x
args.help: Absolute x coordinate for the mouse input.

args.name: y
args.help: Absolute y coordinate for the mouse input.

args.name: button
args.help: Mouse button used by the input action.

args.name: duration
args.help: Input duration in seconds.

args.name: delta-x
args.help: Delta to apply on the x axis for relative movement actions.

args.name: delta-y
args.help: Delta to apply on the y axis for relative movement actions.

args.name: scroll-x
args.help: Horizontal scroll amount for scroll actions.

args.name: scroll-y
args.help: Vertical scroll amount for scroll actions.

args.name: project_path
args.help: Unity project path whose low-level mouse input should be simulated.

commands.name: simulate-keyboard
commands.description: Simulate keyboard input in the Unity editor.

args.name: action
args.help: Keyboard action to simulate.

args.name: key
args.help: Keyboard key or key name to send.

args.name: duration
args.help: Optional key hold duration in seconds.

args.name: project_path
args.help: Unity project path whose keyboard input should be simulated.

commands.name: record-input
commands.description: Record Unity input events for later replay.

args.name: action
args.help: Recording control command.

args.name: output-path
args.help: File path where the recorded input should be saved.

args.name: keys
args.help: Optional key filter or capture key list used during recording.

args.name: delay-seconds
args.help: Delay before recording starts, in seconds.

args.name: show-overlay
args.help: Show an overlay while recording is active.

args.name: project_path
args.help: Unity project path whose input should be recorded.

commands.name: replay-input
commands.description: Replay previously recorded Unity input sequences.

args.name: action
args.help: Replay control command.

args.name: input-path
args.help: File path of the recorded input to replay.

args.name: show-overlay
args.help: Show a playback overlay while the replay is active.

args.name: loop
args.help: Loop the replay until stopped.

args.name: project_path
args.help: Unity project path whose input sequence should be replayed.
